branch_manifest.description: EXEC [ArchiveDB].[silver].[usp_stage_DimCrossDbProfile]: entire write logic is delegated to a cross-database procedure in ArchiveDB; proc body is opaque and cannot be inspected or exercised in sandbox

warnings.message: silver.usp_load_DimCrossDbProfile delegates all write logic to EXEC [ArchiveDB].[silver].[usp_stage_DimCrossDbProfile]. The cross-database reference cannot be resolved in the sandbox environment; all branches are untestable. No unit tests can be generated for this table.
